evidence_reference.theorem_id: T121-T156 or null for procedural diagnostics

rules: Every non-procedural outcome must trace to a theorem ID.
Every procedural diagnostic must be explicitly labeled procedural.
Unsupported syntax returns INCONCLUSIVE_UNSUPPORTED_FRAGMENT, not logical failure.
A PASS result without evidence lineage is forbidden.
CI success is not peer review, empirical confirmation, or physical validation.
